title: Mazars Comment: All quiet on the Western Front. Perhaps too quiet.
section_path: Mazars Comment: All quiet on the Western Front. Perhaps too quiet.
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: All quiet on the Western Front. Perhaps too quiet.
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Last week saw some positive momentum in markets. This was because of two reasons:
Republicans and Democrats seem to be close to a debt ceiling deal. It is not just the optimism from both President Biden and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, but, perhaps more importantly, it is the absence of the usual acerbic accusatory language, concomitant with partisan fights.
